case_title: AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. vs. LYMAN, W.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LYMAN, W. SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LYMAN, W. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT LYMAN, W. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT LYMAN, W. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LYMAN, W.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT LYMAN, W.
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-11-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-04-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE BENSON, KBAUER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 2:25 PM THE ABOVE CASE WAS TO COME FOR TRIAL TOMORROW, 10/11/95. THOMAS WRIGHT WAS PRESENT FOR PLTF, AND DEFT MR. W. LYMAN WAS ALSO PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. BOTH INDICATED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE WAS SETTLED, AND RATHER THAN WAIT FOR TOMORROW, THEY ASKED IF THEY CAN SUBMIT THE JUDGMENT CONTAINING THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION, SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE AGREED, AND SIGNED JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED IN DEPT 1 10/10/95, BOTH PARTIES PRESENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYMAN, W. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET, #317, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-29-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.28 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOTELS, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LYMAN, W.
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF OCT-11-1995 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LYMAN, W.
